{{Quote|It's more than what I want to pay, but what am I going to do? Walk to work?|Valsi Nocurja|<ref name="HNN 55">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|life/1359_1.html|Recharge Prices Jump .4 Credits}}</ref>}}
'''Valsi Nocurja''' was a [[systems analyst]] working in the [[Jrade District/Legends|Jrade District]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. This individual was unhappy with the rise in recharge rates.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|life/1359_1.html|Recharge Prices Jump .4 Credits}} {{1st}}
